steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The conclusion is that the dam benefited grass plants but didn’t benefit trees. The key clue in the passage is the word “whereas” — it signals a contrast between two trends. The correct answer must show one group (grass) increasing over time and the other (forest) decreasing.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Choice D directly shows grass cover increasing from 1987 to 2006 while forest cover decreased in those periods. A, B, and C either focus on bare soil (irrelevant to the conclusion) or fail to show the critical shift in forest and grass trends after the dam in 1992. That matches choice D — D is correct.
